requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — AKEP / ALCIRT Advisory (No Mandatory Product Certification Currently)
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全——AKEP / ALCIRT建议（目前暂无强制产品认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全——AKEP / ALCIRT建議（目前暫無強制產品認證）

summary.en: Albania does not yet have a mandatory cybersecurity product certification scheme for consumer IoT and wireless devices equivalent to the EU's RED Article 3.3(d)-(f) / EN 18031 mandatory requirements (effective 1 August 2025 in the EU). The national cybersecurity authority is AKCESK (National Authority for Cyber Security — Autoriteti Kombëtar i Sigurisë Kibernetike), and the national CERT is ALCIRT (Albanian Computer Incident Response Team). AKEP as the NRA may issue guidance on connected device security as part of its progressive EU RED alignment. Albania's EU accession candidacy (opened 2022) and NATO membership (since 2009) create a trajectory toward mandatory cybersecurity product requirements mirroring EU RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f). Exporters should monitor AKEP and AKCESK regulatory developments and consider voluntary alignment with ETSI EN 303 645 as a risk mitigation measure.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚尚未建立针对消费类物联网和无线设备的强制网络安全认证体系，与欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条/EN 18031强制要求（欧盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不对等。国家网络安全主管机构为AKCESK（国家网络安全局），国家CERT为ALCIRT（阿尔巴尼亚计算机事件响应小组）。AKEP作为国家监管机构，可能在其逐步与欧盟RED对接的过程中就联网设备安全发布指南。阿尔巴尼亚的欧盟入盟候选国地位（2022年开启）和北约成员国身份（2009年起）预示着强制网络安全产品要求将逐步与欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条对接。出口商应持续关注AKEP和AKCESK的监管动态，并考虑自愿参照ETSI EN 303 645作为风险缓解措施。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞尚未建立針對消費類物聯網和無線設備的強制網路安全認證體系，與歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條/EN 18031強制要求（歐盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不對等。國家網路安全主管機構為AKCESK（國家網路安全局），國家CERT為ALCIRT（阿爾巴尼亞計算機事件響應小組）。AKEP作為國家監管機構，可能在其逐步與歐盟RED對接的過程中就聯網設備安全發布指南。阿爾巴尼亞的歐盟入盟候選國地位（2022年開啟）和北約成員國身份（2009年起）預示著強制網路安全產品要求將逐步與歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條對接。出口商應持續關注AKEP和AKCESK的監管動態，並考慮自願參照ETSI EN 303 645作為風險緩解措施。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 08/L-082 on Cybersecurity (Albania) — national cybersecurity framework
AKCESK (Autoriteti Kombëtar i Sigurisë Kibernetike) — national cybersecurity authority
ALCIRT — Albanian Computer Incident Response Team (advisories and guidelines)
AKEP — Electronic and Postal Communications Authority (NRA; may issue connected device guidance)
ETSI EN 303 645 (consumer IoT cybersecurity — advisory benchmark, not yet mandated in Albania)
EU RED Article 3.3(d)-(f) / EN 18031 series — reference framework for future alignment

summary.en: China has mandatory cybersecurity requirements for network-connected products under MIIT and the Cybersecurity Law, including MLPS (Multi-Level Protection Scheme) obligations for systems, and emerging mandatory cybersecurity product certification for certain IoT categories under CNCA. GB/T 36951 (IoT security) and MIIT smart device security requirements are applicable benchmarks.
summary.zh: 中国对联网产品设有MIIT及《网络安全法》下的强制网络安全要求，包括系统层面的等级保护（MLPS）义务，以及CNCA针对特定物联网类别推出的新兴强制网络安全产品认证。GB/T 36951（物联网安全）和MIIT智能设备安全要求是适用基准。
summary.zht: 中國對聯網產品設有MIIT及《網路安全法》下的強制網路安全要求，包括系統層面的等級保護（MLPS）義務，以及CNCA針對特定物聯網類別推出的新興強制網路安全產品認證。GB/T 36951（物聯網安全）和MIIT智能設備安全要求是適用基準。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017)
MLPS — Multi-Level Protection Scheme (等级保护) — systems-level obligation
GB/T 36951-2018 — IoT security reference model and general requirements
MIIT Measures on the Administration of Smart Connected Vehicle Cybersecurity (product-level, sector-specific)
CNCA emerging mandatory cybersecurity certification for select IoT product categories

gap.en: Albania currently has no mandatory IoT device cybersecurity product certification equivalent to China's emerging CNCA mandatory scheme or the EU's mandatory RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f) / EN 18031 requirements. However, Albania's EU accession trajectory and NATO membership mean mandatory cybersecurity product requirements mirroring EU RED are likely in the medium term. Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity certifications are not recognised in Albania, nor currently required. Exporters should conduct voluntary compliance against ETSI EN 303 645 or AKCESK/ALCIRT advisories as a best-practice risk mitigation ahead of potential future mandatory requirements. Monitor AKEP and AKCESK announcements for regulatory changes.
gap.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚目前没有与中国新兴CNCA强制方案或欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条/EN 18031强制要求等效的物联网设备网络安全产品强制认证。但阿尔巴尼亚的入盟进程和北约成员国身份意味着中期内可能采纳与欧盟RED对应的强制网络安全产品要求。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全认证在阿尔巴尼亚不被认可，目前也无要求。出口商应参照ETSI EN 303 645或AKCESK/ALCIRT建议进行自愿合规，作为应对潜在未来强制要求的最佳实践风险缓解措施。请持续关注AKEP和AKCESK的法规动态公告。
gap.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞目前沒有與中國新興CNCA強制方案或歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條/EN 18031強制要求等效的物聯網設備網路安全產品強制認證。但阿爾巴尼亞的入盟進程和北約成員國身份意味著中期內可能採納與歐盟RED對應的強制網路安全產品要求。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全認證在阿爾巴尼亞不被認可，目前也無要求。出口商應參照ETSI EN 303 645或AKCESK/ALCIRT建議進行自願合規，作為應對潛在未來強制要求的最佳實踐風險緩解措施。請持續關注AKEP和AKCESK的法規動態公告。

source.publisher: AKCESK — Autoriteti Kombëtar i Sigurisë Kibernetike (National Authority for Cyber Security, Albania)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Albania does not currently mandate cybersecurity product certification for general consumer wireless / IoT devices. AKCESK and ALCIRT issue non-binding advisories. Voluntary alignment with ETSI EN 303 645 or AKCESK/ALCIRT guidelines is recommended as a risk mitigation measure, given Albania's EU accession candidacy and NATO membership creating a trajectory toward future mandatory requirements mirroring EU RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f). Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity documentation is not required or recognised. Monitor AKEP and AKCESK announcements for regulatory changes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿尔巴尼亚目前未对普通消费类无线/物联网设备强制要求网络安全产品认证。AKCESK和ALCIRT发布非约束性建议。考虑到阿尔巴尼亚入盟候选国地位和北约成员国身份所预示的未来强制要求趋势（对接欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条），建议自愿参照ETSI EN 303 645或AKCESK/ALCIRT指南作为风险缓解措施。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全文件在阿尔巴尼亚不作要求，也不被认可。请持续关注AKEP和AKCESK的法规动态公告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿爾巴尼亞目前未對普通消費類無線/物聯網設備強制要求網路安全產品認證。AKCESK和ALCIRT發布非約束性建議。考慮到阿爾巴尼亞入盟候選國地位和北約成員國身份所預示的未來強制要求趨勢（對接歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條），建議自願參照ETSI EN 303 645或AKCESK/ALCIRT指南作為風險緩解措施。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全文件在阿爾巴尼亞不作要求，也不被認可。請持續關注AKEP和AKCESK的法規動態公告。
